reviews.comment:
La gente es amable, el combustible esta en precio de ruta, pero los bañossss 🤦🏽‍♀️ sin jabón, sin papel higiénico, sin agua y el full compramos unos paninis para comer algo… estaban en mal estado, no hicieron problema para cambiarlo pero un bajón. Esta en plena decadencia, una pena.

(Translated by Google)
The people are friendly, the fuel is reasonably priced, but the bathrooms... 🤦🏽‍♀️ No soap, no toilet paper, no water, and we bought some paninis to eat... they were spoiled. They didn't mind replacing them, but it was a real letdown. It's in a state of disrepair, what a shame.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCN01fRWZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Linda estación de servicio,  justo en la entrada , buena atención y rapidez

(Translated by Google)
Nice gas station, right at the entrance, good service and fast

reviews.comment:

Excellent service; the staff is very friendly and patient, even on busy days.

reviews.comment:
Para temporada de verano es muy chica para tanta demanda de gente pero tiene gran variedad de cosas, stock, cómoda al paso y buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
For the summer season it's too small for such high demand, but it has a great variety of things, good stock, convenient access, and good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCc0xfdmRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Aparte de la.estación de.combustible y la asistencia ACA. Tienen unos espacios verdes para poder parar y descansar un rato antes de retomar ruta.
Todo muy limpio

(Translated by Google)
Besides the gas station and ACA assistance, they have green spaces where you can stop and rest for a while before continuing your journey.
Everything is very clean.

reviews.comment:
Muy cómodo. La parrilla tiene buena calidad y precio normal.
El servi club no difiere de ningún otro que conozcas.
El lugar (todo el predio) es ideal para hacer una parada y empezar a acostumbrarte al gasto que implican las vacaciones jajajajaja. (Llévate la viandita y utilizá las mesitas del camping😂😂😂)

(Translated by Google)
Very comfortable. The grill is good quality and reasonably priced.
The service club is no different from any other you've ever seen.
The place (the entire property) is ideal for a stop and getting used to the expense of vacations, hahahahaha. (Bring your lunch and use the campsite tables. 😂😂😂)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCc0tTM1RnEAE
